data.name:
Sanic HTTP Server
(main.py)
data.description: REST API: login, deploy, invoke, list, destroy. JWT auth (except invoke).

threats.title: No Rate Limiting on Login
threats.mitigation: Add sliding-window rate limiter per IP.

threats.title: Unbounded File Upload
threats.description: No REQUEST_MAX_SIZE; large multipart uploads can exhaust RAM/disk.
threats.mitigation: Set app.config.REQUEST_MAX_SIZE and per-file byte limits.

data.name:
Code Analyzer
(analyzer.py)
data.description: Multi-layer analysis: File validation, YARA, AST+Bandit, LLM (Claude Haiku).

threats.title: Static Analysis Bypass via Aliased Imports
threats.description: AST scanner misses aliased imports (import os as _o) and dynamic attribute access.
threats.mitigation: Build alias map during AST walk; check all resolved module references.

threats.title: Warn-Is-Safe Logic Flaw
threats.description: LLM verdict 'suspicious' maps to safe=True. Many warns still allow deploy.
threats.mitigation: Treat LLM suspicious as fail; add warn-count threshold.

threats.title: LLM Prompt Injection via User Code
threats.description: User code comment could attempt to override LLM system prompt.
threats.mitigation: Add explicit instruction in system prompt to disregard embedded instructions.

data.name:
Deployer
(deployer.py)
data.description: Packages scripts into ext4 images. Builds env images via unjailed Firecracker.

threats.title: Unjailed Env-Builder VM
threats.description: Env-builder Firecracker runs without Jailer; pip install hooks execute as server user.
threats.mitigation: Wrap env-builder in Jailer with dedicated netns and cgroup limits.

threats.title: Firecracker Log in Error Response
threats.description: fc.log contents returned verbatim to user on build failure.
threats.mitigation: Log server-side; return generic error message to client.

threats.title: Malicious requirements.txt
threats.description: User controls packages installed in env VM; setup.py hooks execute arbitrary code.
threats.mitigation: Jail env-builder; consider allowlist or signature verification for packages.

threats.title: Disk Exhaustion via Lambda Accumulation
threats.description: Disk images associated with deleted functions are intentionally retained. Over time this may increase storage consumption.
threats.mitigation: Introduce an archival lifecycle policy with delayed permanent deletion.

data.name:
Orchestrator
(orchestrator.py)
data.description: VM lifecycle: cold/warm start, network namespace, vsock dispatch.

data.name:
Jailer + Firecracker
MicroVM
data.description: KVM-backed VM. Rootfs read-only. cgroup CPU/mem. Dedicated netns.

threats.title: VM Sandbox Escape
threats.description: User code attempts Firecracker/KVM escape via /proc, /dev/mem, nsenter.
threats.mitigation: Jailer enforces chroot, cgroups, seccomp. YARA OblakSandboxEscape rule. KVM hardware boundary.

data.name:
Runner (PID 1)
(runner.py)
data.description: Trusted process inside VM. Mounts drives, imports user module, relays results via vsock.

threats.title: Module Load Path Traversal
threats.description: Theoretical path traversal scenario requiring compromise of trusted deployment metadata.
threats.mitigation: Validate filenames during deployment and module loading.

data.name:
PostgreSQL
(users, lambdas, audit_logs)
data.description: Stores users, lambda metadata, and audit logs. Parameterized queries used throughout.

threats.title: Mutable Audit Log
threats.description: Audit log rows are mutable; no append-only or signed log mechanism.
threats.mitigation: Ship logs to append-only external SIEM; consider PostgreSQL row-level security.

threats.title: Anonymous Invoke Audit Records
threats.description: Invocation audit records may not always contain actor attribution.
threats.mitigation: Join lambdas.owner_id to populate user_id in invoke audit records.

data.name:
Host Filesystem
(lambdas/, envs/)
data.description: Stores .ext4 images for lambdas and env layers. 0640 jailer ownership.
